company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that uses AI to automate video editing workflows, making it easy for YouTubers, Instagrammers, and other content creators to produce high-quality videos at scale.

policies.details: No refunds are issued after 7 days from the date of purchase. Users may request a refund within the first 7 days if unsatisfied.
24/7 customer support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have access to email support with a 1-2 business day response time.
Users can cancel their subscription at any time. The subscription remains active until the end of the current billing period.
AutoStream does not currently offer a free trial, but users can request a demo by contacting our sales team.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support for export?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports export presets for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and LinkedIn (Pro plan only).

faq.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.answer: Yes, you can change your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.

faq.question: Is there a limit on video length?
faq.answer: Basic plan supports videos up to 30 minutes. Pro plan supports videos up to 4 hours.

faq.question: Does AutoStream support team collaboration?
faq.answer: Team collaboration features are on our roadmap. Currently, each account is single-user.
